name: TCNJ / Rutgers New Jersey Medical School Seven-Year Medical Program
mcat_policy: MCAT required; TCNJ page says no minimum score required.

course_grade_minimum: B or better in all premedical courses

Students must take the MCAT, but NJIT FAQ says there is no minimum score requirement.
Students must earn B or better in all premedical courses.
Students must maintain an overall GPA of at least 3.5 each semester.
Students must fulfill Albert Dorman Honors College requirements before matriculating at NJMS.

name: University of Pittsburgh School of Medicine Guaranteed Admission Program

mcat_policy: MCAT required with minimum composite score of 517 within stated attempt/timing limits.
known_academic_requirements: Maintain cumulative undergraduate GPA of 3.70.

Complete undergraduate degree within four years.
Achieve minimum composite MCAT score of 517 within three attempts by the specified timeline.
